title: helia fistulosa
intro: Helia fistulosa, also known as the yellow heliotrope or buttercup bush, is a flowering shrub native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helia fistulosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Helia fistulosa can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
